case_title: MARTINEZ MARTIN VS GAYTAN MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT GAYTAN MARTIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,380.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT GAYTAN MARTIN HERNANDEZ CLARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
